title: Silent Thunderclap
definition: The unspoken axiom at the heart of all, representing the universal truth that transcends languages and cultures, and can only be experienced, not spoken.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The unspoken axiom at the heart of all, representing the universal truth that transcends languages and cultures, and can only be experienced, not spoken.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The unspoken axiom at the heart of all, representing the universal truth that transcends languages and cultures, and can only be experienced, not spoken.
difficulty_levels.expert: The realization that there exists an ultimate truth beyond language and culture, which can be felt but not articulated.

extra_fields.insight: The realization that there exists an ultimate truth beyond language and culture, which can be felt but not articulated.
